claim: A viral image shows the mayor at a protest yesterday in Halifax.
context: The post claims the image is new and proves the mayor attended the protest.

media.description: Social media screenshot showing a public figure in a crowd.

provided_evidence.title: Post text
provided_evidence.content: The post explicitly claims the mayor was at a protest yesterday in Halifax.

provided_evidence.title: Known older image note
provided_evidence.content: A reverse-image note says the same image circulated two years earlier from a different event, making the current context misleading.
